articles.title: SEC Charges Crypto Influencer, Appears To Suggest All Ethereum (ETH) Transactions Fall Under US Jurisdiction
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is filing charges against crypto influencer Ian Balina for his alleged involvement in the 2018 initial coin offering (ICO) of the SPRK token. In a complaint filed with the U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas on September 19th, the SEC says it is taking legal […]

articles.title: Nova Labs will use T-Mobile to fill coverage dead zones
articles.description: T-Mobile and Nova Labs signed a 5-year agreement to augment Nova Labs' Helium network with T-Mobile's 5g coverage, filling service gaps.

articles.title: Cosmos Struggles With $17 As Price Heads Into Distribution Phase
articles.description: ATOM struggles to break $17 as the price gets rejected. The price of ATOM enters the distribution phase on a daily timeframe. ATOM’s price needs to hold the key support at $12 to maintain a bullish structure. Hidden bearish divergence resurfaces in the 4H timeframe. Cosmos (ATOM) has been the major player of the current relief bounce, with price rallying from a region of $6 to $17, with many...

articles.title: The Search For Do Kwon Intensifies As South Korean Prosecutors Ask Interpol To Issue Red Notice Against The Terraform Labs Founder: Report
articles.description: With the Terra co-founder's current location a mystery, South Korean prosecutors have requested that Interpol issue a red notice.
